title: Convert Pseudocode to Code
description: Translate an algorithm or pseudocode into working, idiomatic code.
content:
Translate the following pseudocode/algorithm into idiomatic {{language}}:

{{pseudocode}}

- Preserve the algorithm's complexity; note the Big-O of the result.
- Use clear names; don't leave single-letter variables unless conventional.
- Add input validation where a real caller could pass bad data.
- Include a couple of usage examples.
